description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Functional Tests that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master, except those starting with 'checkvalgrind'. The workflow runs a job matrix with multiple payloads on an ubuntu-22.04 environment, each with a MongoDB and Mosquitto service. For each matrix item, check out the repository and run a functional test using a Docker container with a specific image, mounting the current directory and using a custom range of environment variables.
